components.name: faster-whisper
modifications: Used as a pinned PyPI dependency behind Hina's SttProvider interface; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
Hina locks language=vi and task=transcribe, adds deterministic pre-VAD, bounded admission, no-retention and GPU ResourceLease enforcement.

components.name: vieneu
modifications: Used as a pinned PyPI dependency behind Hina's TtsProvider interface; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
Hina instantiates the pinned ONNX engine through version-specific internal APIs so both model and codec snapshots remain exact-revision local paths.
Hina restricts the integration to CPU int8, one allowlisted preset voice, audio watermarking, bounded admission, cancellation, pre-TTS moderation and no retention or voice cloning.

components.name: qdrant-client
modifications: Used as a pinned PyPI dependency behind Hina's DerivedMemoryIndex interface; no upstream source file or snippet was copied.
Hina uses persistent local mode with no network listener and treats the vector collection as rebuildable derived state rather than authoritative memory.
